nodes.context: A street gang active in the Prairie provinces of Canada, primarily selling cocaine.
Vietnamese gang that preceded the Crazy Dragons, folded after convictions in 2002.
An Asian-Canadian gang in Calgary involved in a gang war.
An Asian-Canadian gang in Calgary involved in a gang war.
Outlaw motorcycle gang active in Canada.

edges.evidence_quote: The Crazy Dragons were the successor gang to the Vietnamese Trang gang, which folded after a series of convictions of its members in 2002.
edges.context: Crazy Dragons succeeded the Trang gang after it folded.

edges.evidence_quote: In 2004, the Crazy Dragons first attracted media attention when the gang kidnapped and beat up five members of the White Boy Posse, a white supremacist gang.
edges.context: Crazy Dragons kidnapped and beat up members of White Boy Posse.

edges.evidence_quote: During a gang war in Calgary between two Asian-Canadian gangs, the Fresh Off the Boat gang and the Fresh Off the Boat Killers, the Crazy Dragons served as gunrunners, selling guns to the Fresh Off the Boat gang.
edges.context: Crazy Dragons sold guns to the Fresh Off the Boat gang.

edges.evidence_quote: the Crazy Dragons in British Columbia were described as subordinate to the Hells Angels.
edges.context: Crazy Dragons were subordinate to Hells Angels in British Columbia.
